title: myroxylon serratum
intro: Myroxylon serratum, also known as Pala Ash or Himalayan Ash, is a tree species native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Myroxylon serratum include relief from fever, arthritis, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Myroxylon serratum include extracts, oils, and powders that can be used in traditional medicine, as well as in the production of Ayurvedic and Unani remedies.
